justification: The question concerns the option-adjusted spread (OAS) of high-yield corporate bonds, which is a specific measure of risk and pricing in fixed income markets.
question: Will the option-adjusted spread of securities with an investment grade rating of BB in the ICE BofA US High Yield Master II Index, which tracks the performance of corporate debt below investment grade in the US domestic market, have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-12-07?
